dataset_title: A cell atlas of human thymic development defines T cell repertoire formation
publication_or_source: A cell atlas of human thymic development defines T cell repertoire formation, Science 2020
repository_or_portal: CELLxGENE; Human Cell Atlas; ArrayExpress; Zenodo
donor_count_reported: 16 donors in CELLxGENE TEC subset; 23 donors in full CELLxGENE dataset; HCA reports 24 donors
age_metadata_detail: development stages include fetal weeks, infant/toddler stages, juvenile stage, third decade, fourth decade; CELLxGENE TEC subset includes 3-month-old, 15-19 year-old, fourth decade and fetal stages
fibroblast_or_mesenchymal_annotation_ava: no explicit mesenchymal in TEC subset; fibroblast present in full dataset
expression_matrix_format: CELLxGENE H5AD; Zenodo annotated H5AD ZIP and raw-count H5AD

recommended_next_action: Audit CELLxGENE TEC H5AD first: inspect obs fields for donor_id, development_stage, sex, assay, sample/library, raw.X, and counts for LOX/LOXL1/LOXL2/LOXL3/LOXL4 by donor and TEC subtype

dataset_title: A spatial human thymus cell atlas mapped to a continuous tissue axis
publication_or_source: A spatial human thymus cell atlas mapped to a continuous tissue axis, Nature 2024
repository_or_portal: CELLxGENE; ENA; GEO; EGA for some managed-access data
donor_count_reported: 18 donors in CELLxGENE TEC subset; 29 donors in full scRNA-seq atlas
age_metadata_detail: CELLxGENE TEC subset includes fetal 12-24 post-fertilization weeks, newborn, 3-month, 6-month, 10-month, and 2-year stages
fibroblast_or_mesenchymal_annotation_ava: yes in separate fibroblast subset and full atlas
expression_matrix_format: CELLxGENE H5AD; source repositories include ENA/GEO/EGA/BioImage Archive
estimated_download_size: CELLxGENE TEC subset about 128.8 MB; fibroblast subset about 71.0 MB; vascular subset about 89.9 MB; full atlas about 1.96 GB; multiple Visium H5AD assets about 98-191 MB each
license_or_access_notes: CELLxGENE public for curated H5ADs; some raw/consented data managed through EGA
main_limitations: Primarily fetal and pediatric; older adult aging not covered; multiple derived subset files require harmonized donor/sample mapping
recommended_next_action: Audit the CELLxGENE thymic epithelial cell subset H5AD, then fibroblast and vascular subsets for contextual LOX-family expression
notes: Strong public TEC subtype resolution including mTEC type 1/2/3, cTEC, corticomedullary TEC, neuro-medullary and myo-medullary labels

dataset_title: Single-cell analysis of human thymus and peripheral blood unveils the dynamics of T-cell development and aging
publication_or_source: Single-cell analysis of human thymus and peripheral blood unveils the dynamics of T cell development and aging, Nature Aging 2025
donor_count_reported: 59 GEO samples; thymus samples through donor47; metadata workbook contains 37 thymus sample IDs in thymocyte metadata
age_metadata_detail: inspected cell-level metadata workbook includes ages from 12 days through 70 years for thymus-associated records and sex labels
expression_matrix_format: GEO supplementary TAR of CSV, MTX, TSV plus cell-level metadata XLSX
estimated_download_size: processed expression archive GSE231906_RAW.tar 3.7 GB; cell-level metadata XLSX 17.2 MB
license_or_access_notes: GEO public; raw sequence data not provided on GEO record; processed data provided as supplementary file
main_limitations: Large processed archive; expression parsing not yet completed; need confirm matrix-to-metadata barcode/sample mapping and whether LOX-family genes are present under expected symbols
recommended_next_action: Stage 2 should first inspect the archive manifest without full extraction if possible, then parse one thymus matrix and join to cell-level metadata; prioritize Epi, Mes, and Endo labels
notes: Most directly age-relevant candidate; current classification remains P2 until expression parsing and feasibility are confirmed
